rationale: The cited 2012 paper is used as a key prior measure in the same research stream, not just as background. The citing paper repeatedly positions PLRM against the Response-to-Failure scale, includes it in nomological and predictive-validity tests (Studies 4-5), and reports that it does not predict behavior after subgoal success. The citing paper also states that its scenario measure design and scoring logic are adapted from the 2012 work, showing direct methodological and conceptual carryover.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the 2012 Response-to-Failure line of work by developing a parallel measure for responses to subgoal success (PLRM) and testing it against the earlier failure-focused scale. It preserves the sequential self-regulation measurement approach while adding a new post-success context and demonstrating construct distinctness.
